title: Godzilla: Rising
body:
**This mod is still under development! You may find bugs or kaiju not spawning naturally.**

This mod adds Godzilla and other monsters from the Godzilla movies.

You can also join the discord [Here](https://discord.gg/zg2AjQQHRF)

This mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [AttributeFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/attributefix)

[Curseforge Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/godzilla-rising)

## The current creatures are:

- Heisei Godzilla
- Burning Godzilla
- Space Godzilla
- King Ghidorah
- Showa Mechagodzilla
- Type-2 Kiryu
- Xiliens
- Heisei Mothra
- Heisei Rodan
- Keizer Ghidorah (disabled)
- Desghidorah (disabled)
- Showa Gojira
- Minus One Gojira (both forms)
- Godzilla 2000
- Destoroyah
- Zilla
- King Kong
- Battra
- Showa Kumonga
- Showa Anguirus
- GMK Godzilla
- Shin Godzilla (all forms)
- Zilla Jr.
- Jet Jaguar
- Gojira 1954
- Heisei Mothra Larva
- Mothra Larva (1961)
- Snow Godzilla (Shinkalion)

## More monsters coming soon!

_More info can be found on the wiki._
[Godzilla Rising Mod Wiki](https://godzilla-rising-mod.fandom.com/wiki/Godzilla_Rising_Mod_Wiki)

**All credit goes to TOHO the oringinal makers of Godzilla.**
